mapper.sql: projectId, projectType, projectCode, projectName, projectState, isback, column001, column002, column003, column004, column005, column006, column007, column008, column009, column010, column011, column012, columno12_readonly, column013, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectRefreshTime, projectCloseTime, customInfo, customConfig, column014
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project (projectType, projectCode, projectName, projectState, isback, column001, column002, column003, column004, column005, column006, column007, column008, column009, column010, column011, column012, columno12_readonly, column013, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectRefreshTime, projectCloseTime, customInfo, customConfig, column014) values (#{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON}, #{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into pm_project
projectType,
projectCode,
projectName,
projectState,
isback,
column001,
column002,
column003,
column004,
column005,
column006,
column007,

column010,
column011,
column012,
columno12_readonly,
column013,
customerProjectName,
salesType,
compId,
createTime,
createBy,
updateTime,
updateBy,
effectiveFrom,
effectiveTo,
disabled,
projectStartTime,
projectRefreshTime,
projectCloseTime,
customInfo,
customConfig,
column014,
#{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
#{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON},
#{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update pm_project
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectCode = #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectName = #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectState = #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isback = #{isback,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column001 = #{column001,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column002 = #{column002,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column003 = #{column003,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column004 = #{column004,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column005 = #{column005,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column006 = #{column006,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column007 = #{column007,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column008 = #{column008,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column009 = #{column009,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
column010 = #{column010,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column011 = #{column011,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column012 = #{column012,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
columno12_readonly = #{columno12_readonly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
column013 = #{column013,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerProjectName = #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesType = #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compId = #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
projectStartTime = #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectRefreshTime = #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectCloseTime = #{projectCloseTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}),
customConfig = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customConfig, "{}"), #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON}),
column014 = #{column014,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where projectId = #{projectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

if.if: (ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND

trim.if: ( ph.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.isback like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column001 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column002 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column003 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column004 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column005 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column006 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column007 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column008 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column010 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column011 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column012 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column013 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column014 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from pm_project as ph
ph.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectCode = #{projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectName = #{projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectState = #{projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.isback = #{isback, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column001 = #{column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column002 = #{column002, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column003 = #{column003, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column004 = #{column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column005 = #{column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column006 = #{column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column007 = #{column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column008 = #{column008, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column009 = #{column009, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.column010 = #{column010, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column011 = #{column011, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column012 = #{column012, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.columno12_readonly = #{columno12_readonly, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.column013 = #{column013, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.customerProjectName = #{customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.salesType = #{salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.compId = #{compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
ph.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ph.projectStartTime = #{projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectRefreshTime = #{projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectCloseTime = #{projectCloseTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ph.customConfig = #{customConfig, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ph.column014 = #{column014, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectType`, #{projectTypes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`column001`, #{officeCodes}) AND

select count(1) from pm_project as ph
ph.projectId = #{projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectType = #{projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectCode = #{projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectName = #{projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectState = #{projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.isback = #{isback, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column001 = #{column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column002 = #{column002, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column003 = #{column003, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column004 = #{column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column005 = #{column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column006 = #{column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column007 = #{column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column008 = #{column008, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column009 = #{column009, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.column010 = #{column010, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column011 = #{column011, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column012 = #{column012, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.columno12_readonly = #{columno12_readonly, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.column013 = #{column013, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.customerProjectName = #{customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.salesType = #{salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.compId = #{compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
ph.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ph.projectStartTime = #{projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectRefreshTime = #{projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectCloseTime = #{projectCloseTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ph.customConfig = #{customConfig, jdbcType=JSON} AND
ph.column014 = #{column014, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectType`, #{projectTypes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`column001`, #{officeCodes}) AND

select ph.*, bd.`basicDataName` as projectStateName from pm_project as ph LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND bd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState`
ph.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectCode like concat("%", #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
(ph.projectName like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") OR ph.customInfo -> '$.projectAlias' like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") ) AND
ph.projectState = #{model.projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.isback = #{model.isback, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column001 = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column002 = #{model.column002, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column003 like concat("%", #{model.column003, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column004 like concat("%", #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column005 like concat("%", #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column006 like concat("%", #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column007 like concat("%", #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column008 = #{model.column008, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column009 = #{model.column009, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.column010 = #{model.column010, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column011 = #{model.column011, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column012 = #{model.column012, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.columno12_readonly = #{model.columno12_readonly, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.column013 like concat("%", #{model.column013, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.customerProjectName = #{model.customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.salesType = #{model.salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.compId = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
ph.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ph.projectStartTime = #{model.projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectRefreshTime = #{model.projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectCloseTime = #{model.projectCloseTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
ph.customConfig -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
ph.column014 = #{model.column014, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`column001`, #{model.officeCodes}) AND
( ph.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.isback like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column001 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column002 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column003 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column004 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column005 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column006 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column007 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column008 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column010 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column011 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column012 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column013 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customConfig like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column014 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from pm_project as ph
ph.projectId = #{model.projectId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.projectCode like concat("%", #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
(ph.projectName like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") OR ph.customInfo -> '$.projectAlias' like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") ) AND
ph.projectState = #{model.projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.isback = #{model.isback, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column001 = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column002 = #{model.column002, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column003 like concat("%", #{model.column003, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column004 like concat("%", #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column005 like concat("%", #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column006 like concat("%", #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column007 like concat("%", #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.column008 = #{model.column008, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column009 = #{model.column009, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.column010 = #{model.column010, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column011 = #{model.column011, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.column012 = #{model.column012, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.columno12_readonly = #{model.columno12_readonly, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.column013 like concat("%", #{model.column013, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
ph.customerProjectName = #{model.customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.salesType = #{model.salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.compId = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
ph.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
ph.effectiveFrom <= #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
(ph.effectiveTo is null or ph.effectiveTo >= #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}) AND
ph.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
ph.projectStartTime = #{model.projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectRefreshTime = #{model.projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.projectCloseTime = #{model.projectCloseTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
ph.customInfo -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
ph.customConfig -> '$.${key}' like concat("%", #{value}, "%") AND
ph.column014 = #{model.column014, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes}) AND
FIND_IN_SET(ph.`column001`, #{model.officeCodes}) AND
( ph.projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.isback like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column001 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column002 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column003 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column004 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column005 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column006 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column007 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column008 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column010 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column011 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column012 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column013 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.customConfig like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or ph.column014 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select ph.*, bd.`basicDataName` as projectStateName from pm_project ph LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND bd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` where ph.projectId = #{projectId}

select ph.projectState, bd.`basicDataName` as projectStateName from pm_project ph LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = concat(ph.`projectType`, "_projectState") AND bd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` where ph.projectId = #{projectId}
mapper.sql:
select distinct null as `projectId`, pp.projectCode as `projectCode`, null as `rank`, ifnull(pp.projectName, p.projectName) as `projectName`, `fd`.`basicDataName` as `projectStateName`, `fd`.`basicDataId` as `projectState`, ifnull( `p`.`contractNo`, pp.projectCode ) as `contractNo`, ifnull(c1.id, c2.id) as compId, `pp`.`officeCode` as `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` as `officeName`, `pp`.`salesManCode` as `salesManCode`, `pp`.`salesManName` as `salesManName`, null as `projectStartTime`, null as projectCreateTime, `pp`.`systemName` as `systemName`, null as `serviceManager`, null as `serviceManagerName`, null as `projectManager`, null as `projectManagerName`, null as shipmentStateName, null as shipmentState, null as planStateName, null as projectPlanState, null as executionStateName, null as executionState, null as closeProcessStateName, null as closeProcessState, null as projectRefreshTime, null as projectCloseTime, null ssfs, null ssfsName, null partnerChannel, pp.projectType from `pm_project_property_af_from_sms` `pp` left join `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` on `p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber` left join `view_distinct_contract` `v` on `v`.`id` = `p`.`id` left join `fnd_department` `d` on `pp`.`officeCode` = `d`.`departmentNum` left join `fnd_basic_data` `fd` on `fd`.`basicDataId` = '10' and `fd`.`dataTypeCode` = concat(pp.projectType, "_projectState")
left join fnd_company c1 on c1.code = p.compCode left join fnd_company c2 on c2.`code` = pp.corporationCode where
pp.`projectType` = 'afss'
and pp.projectType = #{model.projectType}
AND pp.projectCode like concat("%", #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND IFNULL(pp.projectName, p.projectName) like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
AND p.contractNo like concat("%", #{model.contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.customInfo.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.officeCode = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND pp.marketName like concat("%", #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.systemName like concat("%", #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.expendName like concat("%", #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.industryName like concat("%", #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} = IFNULL(c1.id, c2.id)
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes})
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`officeCode`, #{model.officeCodes})
AND ( pp.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or p.contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
and not exists (select 1 from `pm_project_contract` `t1` join `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` on `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` join `pm_project` `t3` on ( `t2`.`projectCode` = `t3`.`projectCode` or `t3`.`projectCode` = replace(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") ) and `t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= now() and ( `t3`.`effectiveTo` > now() or isnull(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) ) where t3.`projectType` = pp.`projectType` and ( ( `v`.`contractNo` = `t1`.`contractNo` and v.contractNo is not null ) )) and v.`contractNo` is not null
union select distinct null as `projectId`, pp.projectCode as `projectCode`, null as `rank`, ifnull(pp.projectName, p.projectName) as `projectName`, `fd`.`basicDataName` as `projectStateName`, `fd`.`basicDataId` as `projectState`, ifnull( `p`.`contractNo`, pp.projectCode ) as `contractNo`, ifnull(c1.id, c2.id) as compId, `pp`.`officeCode` as `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` as `officeName`, `pp`.`salesManCode` as `salesManCode`, `pp`.`salesManName` as `salesManName`, null as `projectStartTime`, null as projectCreateTime, `pp`.`systemName` as `systemName`, null as `serviceManager`, null as `serviceManagerName`, null as `projectManager`, null as `projectManagerName`, null as shipmentStateName, null as shipmentState, null as planStateName, null as projectPlanState, null as executionStateName, null as executionState, null as closeProcessStateName, null as closeProcessState, null as projectRefreshTime, null as projectCloseTime, null ssfs, null ssfsName, null partnerChannel, pp.projectType from `pm_project_property_af_from_sms` `pp` left join `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` on `p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber` left join `view_distinct_contract` `v` on `v`.`id` = `p`.`id` left join `fnd_department` `d` on `pp`.`officeCode` = `d`.`departmentNum` left join `fnd_basic_data` `fd` on `fd`.`basicDataId` = '10' and `fd`.`dataTypeCode` = concat(pp.projectType, "_projectState")
left join fnd_company c1 on c1.code = p.compCode left join fnd_company c2 on c2.`code` = pp.corporationCode where
pp.`projectType` = 'afxx'
and pp.projectType = #{model.projectType}
AND pp.projectCode like concat("%", #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND IFNULL(pp.projectName, p.projectName) like concat("%", #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%") AND
AND p.contractNo like concat("%", #{model.contractNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.salesManName like concat("%", #{model.customInfo.salesManName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.officeCode = #{model.column001, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND pp.marketName like concat("%", #{model.column004, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.systemName like concat("%", #{model.column005, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.expendName like concat("%", #{model.column006, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND pp.industryName like concat("%", #{model.column007, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "%")
AND #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} = IFNULL(c1.id, c2.id)
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`projectType`, #{model.projectTypes})
AND FIND_IN_SET(pp.`officeCode`, #{model.officeCodes})
AND ( pp.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or p.contractNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
and not exists (select 1 from `pm_project_contract` `t1` join `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` on `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` join `pm_project` `t3` on ( `t2`.`projectCode` = `t3`.`projectCode` or `t3`.`projectCode` = replace(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") ) and `t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= now() and ( `t3`.`effectiveTo` > now() or isnull(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) )
where t3.`projectType` = pp.`projectType`
and pp.`projectCode` = t1.`contractNo` ) union all SELECT ph.`projectId`, `projectCode`, NULL AS `rank`, `projectName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.projectStateName" AS `projectStateName`, `fd`.`basicDataId` AS `projectState`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.contractNo" AS `contractNo`, ph.compId, ph.`column001` AS `officeCode`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.officeName" AS `officeName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.salesManCode" AS `salesManCode`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.salesManName" AS `salesManName`, ph.`projectStartTime`, ph.createTime AS projectCreateTime, ph.`column005` AS `systemName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.serviceManagerCode" AS `serviceManager`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.serviceManagerforjson" AS `serviceManagerName`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.programManagerCode" AS `projectManager`, ph.customInfo ->> "$.programManagerCodeforjson" AS `projectManagerName`, NULL AS shipmentStateName, NULL AS shipmentState, NULL AS planStateName, NULL AS projectPlanState, NULL AS executionStateName, NULL AS executionState, NULL AS closeProcessStateName, NULL AS closeProcessState, NULL AS projectRefreshTime, NULL AS projectCloseTime, NULL ssfs, NULL ssfsName, NULL partnerChannel, ph.projectType FROM pm_project ph LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON `fd`.`basicDataId` = '10' AND `fd`.`dataTypeCode` = CONCAT(ph.projectType, "_projectState")
mapper.select:
select p.`permission_name` from `t_permission` p left join `t_role_permission` rp on rp.permission_id = p.permission_id left join `t_role` r on rp.role_id = r.role_id left join `fnd_basic_data` db on db.dataTypeCode = 'afProjectMember'
and find_in_set(db.basicDataId, #{memberRoles})
and p.permission_name regexp ":detail|:list"
and r.role_name = db.basicDataAttri1 where r.role_name = db.basicDataAttri1
and p.permission_name regexp #{permissionTypes}
